mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in real activity-sensitive retail sales signals rising household demand and near-term revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the trend is used as an always-on signal.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS trends are followed by lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than negative RSAFS trends in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 for three consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp deterioration in unemployment signals falling labor income and weaker expected corporate revenues; when UNRATE rises materially over a short window, S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days are negative.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations, or if triggered returns are not below non-triggered returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and tightens financing conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days after policy-rate increases.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises more than 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns after FEDFUNDS increases are not lower than returns after flat or falling FEDFUNDS in walk-forward tests, or if the estimated slope is positive in two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in industrial production signals improving operating leverage and stronger goods-sector earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum has a nonpositive average 20-day S&P 500 forward return or if its walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 in every rolling 3-year evaluation window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in housing starts and payroll employment signals broad private-sector demand and income formation, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through higher expected earnings.
candidate_trigger: HOUST and PAYEMS both rise over the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint HOUST-PAYEMS up signal does not outperform cases where only one series rises, or if triggered 60-day returns are positive in fewer than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices accelerate while the federal funds rate also rises, inflation pressure and tighter policy jointly compress equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month change is positive and FEDFUNDS rises over the same 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS tightening signal is followed by higher 20-day returns than periods with falling FEDFUNDS, or if the interaction coefficient is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained payroll expansion signals improving aggregate income and lower recession risk; when PAYEMS rises over consecutive months, S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days are positive through short-horizon growth repricing.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises for 3 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day S&P 500 returns after three consecutive PAYEMS increases are not positive on average, or if the hit rate is below 50% across at least three rolling 2-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A material decline in housing starts signals weakening construction activity, credit demand, and household durable-goods spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% over 6 months
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines greater than 10% over 6 months are followed by nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if triggered returns are not below untriggered returns at p < 0.10.
